title: Control access to external user email and notifications
description: We’re improving how you manage access to email content and notifications for external users. You can now set email and notification visibility in your external user policy. This means you control whether external users receive content in emails from apps like Jira and Confluence. You can also control if external users receive mobile app push notifications.
